---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
library(brms)
library(tidyverse)
library(BayesFactor)
library(BayesianId)
```

```{r}
data("penguins")
test_data = na.omit(penguins) %>% mutate(across(where(is.numeric), scale))
levels(test_data$island)
```

```{r}
nc = length(levels(test_data$island)) - 1
contrasts(test_data$island) = contr_banova(nc + 1)
contrasts(test_data$island)
X = model.matrix(~ flipper_len + island, data = test_data)
head(X)
colMeans(X)
```
```{r}
prep = data.frame(y = c(-2, 9, 1, 8, -3, 1, 7),
                       x1 = factor(c("a", "b", "b", "a", "c", "a", "c")),
                       x2 = c(1, 2, 3, 1, 1, 0, 2),
                       x = c(-1.4, 0.1, 0.8, -0.9, 0.5, -2.4, 12.0)) %>%
  prepare_data(formula = y ~ x1 + x2 + x)
  #prepare_data(formula = y ~ x1 + x2 + x3 + x1:x2 + x2:x3)

X = model.matrix(y ~ x1 + x2 + x,
                 data = prep$data)
head(X)
```
```{r}
head(penguins)
```

```{r}
fit = brm_indprior(body_mass ~ flipper_len*bill_len + (flipper_len*bill_len | island), 
         data = test_data,
         chains = 2,
         seed = 1212)
```
```{r}
summary(fit)
```


```{r}
library(bayesplot)

mcmc_dens(fit, pars = vars(starts_with("SD")), adjust = 2)
```


```{r}
formula(fit)$formula |> findbars()
```

```{r}
bar = fit_submodels(fit, submodels(formula(fit)))
```

```{r}
library(lme4)
fit_lmer = lmer(body_mass ~ flipper_len*bill_len + (1 | island), 
                data = test_data,
                REML = FALSE)
results = inc_tests(fit_lmer)
```

```{r}
results$inc_tabl
```


```{r}
vcov(results$fit_list[[1]])
```

```{r}
confint(results$fit_list[[1]], method = "Wald")
```
```{r}
print(fixef(results$fit_list[[1]])["flipper_len"] - 1.96*sqrt(vcov(results$fit_list[[1]])["flipper_len", "flipper_len"]))

print(fixef(results$fit_list[[1]])["flipper_len"] + 1.96*sqrt(vcov(results$fit_list[[1]])["flipper_len", "flipper_len"]))
```


```{r}
coef(results$fit_list[[1]])
```



```{r}
fit_lm = lm(body_mass ~ flipper_len*bill_len,
            data = test_data)
inc_tests(fit_lm)
```

```{r}
vcov(fit_lm)
```

```{r}
fit_blmer = blmer(body_mass ~ flipper_len*bill_len + (flipper_len*bill_len | island),
                  data = test_data,
                  REML = FALSE,
                  fixef.prior = normal,
                  cov.prior = gamma)
summary(fit_blmer)
```

```{r}
fit_blmer2 = update(fit_blmer, formula = body_mass ~ flipper_len + bill_len + (flipper_len + bill_len | island))
```

```{r}
fit_list = list(fit_lmer, fit_lmer2)
lapply(fit_list, BIC) |> unlist()
```

```{r}
print(fit_blmer)
```


```{r}
test_marginality = function(terms){
  is_interaction = grepl("\\:", terms)
  all_okay = terms[is_interaction] |> sapply(function(intr){has_needed(terms, intr)}) |> all()
  return(all_okay)
}
```

```{r}
is_interaction = grepl("\\:", terms)
terms[is_interaction] |> sapply(function(intr){has_needed(terms, intr)})
```

```{r}
test_marginality(c("a", "b", "c", "a:b", "b:c", "a:c", "a:b:c")) |> print()
test_marginality(c("a", "b", "c", "a:b", "b:c", "a:b:c")) |> print()
```

```{r}
has_needed = function(terms, intr){
  parts = strsplit(intr, "\\:") |> unlist()
  ord = length(parts)
  what_needed = combn(parts, ord - 1, simplify = FALSE) |> lapply(function(x){paste(x, collapse = ":")}) |> unlist()
  return(all(what_needed %in% terms))
}
```
